cohesion_notes: Cherchesov had prepared the host squad together for an extended period.
quality_notes: Host advantage and organisation offset a modest pre-tournament ranking.

cohesion_notes: Pizzi took charge late in the qualifying cycle.
quality_notes: Technically capable but short of top-level physical and defensive quality.

cohesion_notes: Cuper retained a compact settled qualifying system.
depth_notes: Heavy reliance on a small attacking core.
quality_notes: Salah supplied elite transition threat within a defensive side.
injury_notes: Salah entered the tournament recovering from a shoulder injury.

cohesion_notes: Tabarez retained a highly experienced tournament structure.
quality_notes: Suarez Cavani Godin and Gimenez formed an elite spine.

age_notes: Ronaldo Pepe and several starters formed an older core.
cohesion_notes: Santos retained the Euro 2016 winning structure.
quality_notes: Ronaldo led an elite attack supported by a strong defensive system.

cohesion_notes: Lopetegui was dismissed immediately before the tournament.
depth_notes: Elite alternatives throughout midfield and attack.
quality_notes: Outstanding technical quality but disrupted late preparation.

cohesion_notes: Renard had built an unbeaten and defensively strong qualifying side.
quality_notes: Technical midfield and strong organisation with limited finishing.

cohesion_notes: Queiroz retained a disciplined long-term defensive structure.
quality_notes: Excellent organisation but modest creativity and scoring depth.

cohesion_notes: Deschamps retained an established tournament core.
quality_notes: Elite attack midfield and defence made France a leading contender.

age_notes: Several important players were beyond their peak.
cohesion_notes: Van Marwijk had taken charge after qualification.
quality_notes: Physical and experienced but lacking elite attacking quality.

cohesion_notes: Gareca had established a cohesive possession-oriented side.
quality_notes: Strong collective form with modest individual quality.
injury_notes: Guerrero returned late after his suspension was temporarily lifted.

cohesion_notes: Hareide had built an unbeaten and balanced qualifying side.
quality_notes: Eriksen supplied creativity within a strong defensive structure.

age_notes: Messi Mascherano and several starters formed an aging core.
cohesion_notes: Sampaoli had not settled on a consistent system.
quality_notes: Elite attacking talent but an unstable midfield and defence.
dropout_notes: Lanzini was ruled out shortly before the tournament.

cohesion_notes: Hallgrimsson retained the settled Euro 2016 structure.
depth_notes: Limited depth beyond the main eleven.
quality_notes: Compact and dangerous from set pieces but limited in possession.

age_notes: Modric Rakitic Mandzukic and several starters were experienced veterans.
cohesion_notes: Dalic retained the core that completed qualification.
quality_notes: Elite midfield control and a balanced defence.

cohesion_notes: Rohr had developed a young athletic side.
quality_notes: Fast dangerous attack with an inconsistent defence.

cohesion_notes: Tite had transformed Brazil into a settled and balanced team.
quality_notes: Neymar Coutinho and an elite defence made Brazil the favourite.
injury_notes: Neymar had only recently returned from a long foot injury.

cohesion_notes: Petkovic retained an experienced compact structure.
quality_notes: Strong organisation and midfield with no elite striker.

age_notes: Much of the 2014 team remained central four years later.
cohesion_notes: Ramirez retained a familiar defensive system.
quality_notes: Navas anchored a disciplined side with limited attacking output.

cohesion_notes: Krstajic took charge after qualification and changed the system.
quality_notes: Strong central talent and aerial threat but questionable balance.

cohesion_notes: Low retained the 2014 world champion structure.
depth_notes: Exceptional depth despite several selection debates.
quality_notes: Elite midfield and attack with concerns about defensive transition.
injury_notes: Neuer had played very little after a long foot injury.

cohesion_notes: Osorio retained a flexible but frequently rotated system.
quality_notes: Strong attackers and midfield with an average defence.

cohesion_notes: Andersson had built a cohesive collective without Ibrahimovic.
quality_notes: Excellent organisation but limited elite creativity.

cohesion_notes: Shin retained an energetic transition-focused group.
quality_notes: Son provided elite threat but the defence was vulnerable.

cohesion_notes: Martinez had established a settled attacking system.
quality_notes: Hazard De Bruyne Lukaku and Courtois formed an elite core.
injury_notes: Kompany entered with a groin injury and missed the opening matches.

age_notes: An experienced but aging qualifying squad made its tournament debut.
cohesion_notes: Gomez retained a settled defensive structure.
depth_notes: Very limited depth at this level.
quality_notes: Organised and physical but substantially below elite tournament quality.

cohesion_notes: Maaloul retained a compact qualifying side.
quality_notes: Disciplined but lacking reliable high-level scoring.

cohesion_notes: Southgate had established a clear three-defender system.
depth_notes: Strong options but limited experience in some positions.
quality_notes: Kane Sterling and a young athletic squad offered balanced quality.

age_notes: Lewandowski Piszczek and several starters formed an older core.
cohesion_notes: Nawalka retained the Euro 2016 structure.
quality_notes: Lewandowski supplied elite finishing but the defence was less convincing.

cohesion_notes: Cisse retained a cohesive athletic qualifying side.
quality_notes: Mane Koulibaly and Gueye provided quality across the spine.

cohesion_notes: Pekerman retained the experienced 2014 tournament core.
quality_notes: James Falcao Cuadrado and a strong defence offered balanced quality.
injury_notes: James entered the tournament with a calf problem.

cohesion_notes: Nishino replaced Halilhodzic only two months before kickoff.
quality_notes: Technical and experienced but disrupted in preparation.
